class.name: nav2_constrained_controller::ConstrainedController
class.description: Holonomic constrained-space controller for narrow alleys and door-to-door transitions. Each tick: A* on a thresholded local ESDF, EGO-Planner cubic B-spline optimisation (Zhou et al. 2020) with L-BFGS + strong Wolfe line search, FF+P sampling of the spline at lookahead, then a body-aware CBF QP safety filter (Saradagi 2024) as the u* projection.
